summary: The protagonist, VANIL, is determined to defeat the MOUNTAIN KING and steal everything from her. However, he soon realizes that she is using the SEAL OF RUTHLESSNESS and has surpassed him in power. Despite this, Vanil decides to press on, seeking to understand and surpass the Mountain King's abilities. Meanwhile, MEPHISTOPHELES arrives, granting VANIL an oracle that predicts his future as a powerful ruler.
key_moments: Vanil's determination to defeat the MOUNTAIN KING
The revelation of the Mountain King's powers
Mephistopheles' appearance and grant of the oracle
